name: 1'8"x5" Low Profile Kitchen Runner Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Create a stylish look in the busiest room of your house with the Low Profile Kitchen Runner from Room Essentials™. This rectangular kitchen runner comes in a black hue for a stylish look that blends well with any decor. The polyurethane material provides soft underfoot comfort, while a flat pile height makes it suitable for high-traffic areas within your home.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
